zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Ireland於大約1247年出生時，她的父親Robert Ireland30歲，母親Beatrice Daresby25歲。她於1268年之前與Sir Henry Le Norreys在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1320年在英國藍卡爾艾爾頓黑阿德享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Ireland于大约1247年出生时，她的父亲Robert Ireland30岁，母亲Beatrice Daresby25岁。她于1268年之前与Sir Henry Le Norreys在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1320年在英国藍卡爾艾爾頓黑阿德享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ireland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: ethnic name denoting someone from Ireland, from Middle English Irland, Irlond, Erlond (Old English Īraland). The country gets its name from the genitive case of Old English Īras ‘Irishmen’ + land ‘land’. The stem Īr- is taken from the Celtic name for Ireland, Èriu, earlier Everiu. The Latin name was (H)ibernia. The surname is especially common in Liverpool, England, which has a large Irish population. Compare Irish .

variants.name: Irelan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irland
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irish
meanings: English and Irish (Kilkenny): ethnic name for someone of Irish origin, from Old French Ireis or Middle English Irish ‘Irish’, Latinized as Hiberniens(is). Compare Ireland .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Ireland was born about 1247, her father, Robert Ireland, was 30 and her mother, Beatrice Daresby, was 25. She married Sir Henry Le Norreys before 1268, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1320, in Eltonhead, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Ireland est née environ 1247, son père, Robert Ireland, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Daresby, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Le Norreys avant 1268, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1320, à Eltonhead, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Ireland um 1247 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ireland 30 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Daresby 25. Sie hat vor 1268 in England Sir Henry Le Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1320 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Eltonhead, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Ireland è nata il circa 1247, sua padre, Robert Ireland, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Daresby, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Le Norreys prima del 1268, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1320, nel Eltonhead, Lancashire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Irelandが約1247年に生まれた時，父Robert Irelandは30歳，母Beatrice Daresbyは25歳であった。1268年以前にイギリスでSir Henry Le Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1320年にイギリスランカシュアイアエルトンヘドで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Ireland(이)가 대략 1247년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ireland(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Daresby(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1268년 이전 영국에서 Sir Henry Le Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 랭카실르 엘토헤드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Ireland nasceu aproximadamente 1247, seu pai, Robert Ireland, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Daresby, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Le Norreys antes 1268, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1320, em Eltonhead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Ireland родилась около 1247 г., её отцу по имени Robert Ireland было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Daresby, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Le Norreys перед 1268 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1320 г. в местности элтонид, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Ireland nació aproximadamente 1247, su papá, Robert Ireland, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatrice Daresby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Le Norreys antes de 1268, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1320, en Eltonhead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
